# First 100 Posts Plan

The first 100 posts are not “content.” They are experimental runs.

## Posts 1–20 — Attention calibration

```text
10 first-frame tests
10 hook tests
```

Goal:

```text
identify scroll-stop and early-hold mechanisms
```

## Posts 21–40 — Comprehension calibration

```text
text/caption tests
screen recording tests
proof placement tests
```

Goal:

```text
improve APV, completion, saves
```

## Posts 41–60 — Action calibration

```text
save CTA
send CTA
comment prompt
follow/series promise
```

Goal:

```text
map content types to actions
```

## Posts 61–80 — Platform translation

```text
TikTok-native
Reels-native
Shorts-native
search-native
Trial Reel tests
```

Goal:

```text
separate platform-specific tactics from general mechanisms
```

## Posts 81–100 — Format scaling

```text
top 3 mechanisms
replication trios
named series
cross-platform translations
search evergreen versions
```

Goal:

```text
create 2–3 validated recurring formats
```

## Success by post 100

The goal is not one viral hit. The goal is:

```text
3 reliable attention mechanisms
3 reliable retention mechanisms
2 saveable formats
2 sendable formats
1–3 follow-converting series
1 evergreen/search content lane
```
